metadata.title:
OTHER COMPANIES SAY


IT is A HOT PACE

pages.raw_text:
President Henry NJ. Richards of the
Washington Water Power company
is pleased over letters of inquiry
which the company has received from
street railway corporations in some
of the eastern cities asking if it were
really true that the water power COM
pany had turned over the total earn
ings of an entire day towards the
building fund for ct. Luke's hospital.


In the east some of the street car
companies have given an hour or two
of their earnings on some picked day
for charity" said Mr.. Richards this
morning, but it is a poser when some
of their customers come forward with
the announcement that in distant
Spokane a whole days earnings of
the entire system have been given to
charity.


1T is poser for those fasteners,
and they have been writing to know
how We can afford to do it; and if It
pays to divert the earnings of the
company in this manner.


I'm connection with this matter. the
following letter. one of several. from
the st. Joseph (Mo.) Railway. Light,
